data.title: Cathie Wood's Thursday Moves: Dumps Buzzing Stocks Tesla And Palantir
data.description: On Thursday, Dec. 19, 2024 Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest sold shares of Tesla and Palantir, both of which have run up considerably for the month.

data.title: BlackBerry Beats Q3 Earnings Estimates, But Soft Guidance Keeps Shares In Check
data.description: BlackBerry reports third-quarter revenue of $162 million. The company reports third-quarter adjusted earnings of 2 cents per share, beating analyst estimates for a loss of 1 cent per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: $1000 Invested In Jones Lang LaSalle 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
If You Invested $100 In This Stock 15 Years Ago, You Would Have This Much Today
House Rejects Trump-Endorsed Backup Plan To Prevent Government Shutdown And Suspend Debt Limit: Lawmakers Chant 'Hell No'
data.description: The House rejected Speaker Mike Johnson's debt-limit suspension plan, increasing the risk of a government shutdown ahead of Friday's deadline on Thursday, December 19, 2024.
